title: URO route mount — close FU-EB-URO-MAIN-MOUNT-1 (T5 STAGE-DEV-4 unblocker)

Files and closes FU-EB-URO-MAIN-MOUNT-1 in the same PR (filed-and-closed pattern). Mount-only diff: no route handler logic changes, no other refactors. Scope-locked per memory #18.

notes:
Closes the URO mount tech-debt surfaced during T5 CLI execution 2026-06-09. T5 CLI noted: 'matches the existing viewer-token deferral pattern — both routes have "Mount at /api/uro in main.ts" comments but neither is wired yet.' Effect on T5 STAGE-DEV-4: curl /api/uro/voxel-groups returns 404 because barrel is unmounted in main.ts. This deliverable closes that gap. Filed-and-closed FU pattern: FU-EB-URO-MAIN-MOUNT-1 is filed and closed in the same PR that mounts the route. Verified pre-authoring substrate (lesson from T5 tarball failure 2026-06-09): (1) Framework: Express ^4.18 confirmed via eb-agent:query-tech-components category=frameworks 2026-06-09 (NOT Fastify — T5 lesson); (2) FU baseline: eb-agent:query-followups 2026-06-09 confirmed FU-EB-URO-MAIN-MOUNT-1 absent from 307-FU register; (3) Parallel deferral: viewer-token mint+land work blocked by FU-EB-USER-JWT-JTI-CLAIM-1 (P1 open in 307-FU register). The id FU-EB-URO-VIEWER-TOKEN-MINT-LAND-1 appears only as a dangling forward-reference in FU-EB-USER-JWT-JTI-CLAIM-1.blocks[]; no actual FU entry by that id exists in the register (substrate-correction observation per SR-chat landing-time substrate-read 2026-06-09; surfaced as separate FU-register hygiene item, out of scope for this arc). Viewer-token mount stays out of this arc; (4) Parent linkage: parentDeliverable d-2026-06-09-eb-tier1-t5-groups-occupancy (T5 — this is the documented-debt closure for T5). Out of scope (explicit per memory #18 scope-lock): (a) viewer-token route mount (blocked by jti claim work); (b) main.ts pre-existing ESLint errors (separate adjacent debt; diff-vs-baseline pattern applied so this arc does not regress, does not cleanup); (c) any change to voxel-groups.route.ts handler or routes/uro/index.ts barrel (T5 scope, already merged). Cross-repo flow per F0B85LNSTC4: SR-chat lands anchor PR at schemas/_instances/deliverables/d-2026-06-09-eb-uro-routes-main-mount.json against canonical deliverable.schema.json v1.2.0; squash-merge fresh L4 named-step. EB-CLI then receives execution dispatch from EB-chat (substrate-read first, then mount tarball). EB PR merges to EB main. SR-chat closes with TRUTH-DELIVERED post STAGE-PROD-6. Anti-pattern avoided (per L4 correction 2026-06-09): authoring a markdown PROMPT in place of a deliverable spec is anti-pattern. The canonical artifact for tech-debt closure is the schema-bound deliverable instance — this file. The substrate-read dispatch (.md) is the execution tool, not the deliverable. Enterprise Excellence. Schema-First. No Shortcuts.

[SR-CHAT SUBSTRATE-CORRECTION at LANDING-TIME 2026-06-09] Per L4 named-step 'land with amend scope' authorized 2026-06-09 in SR-chat, three substrate-honesty corrections applied to EB-chat's authored draft (EB-chat draft SHA256 93a43107442da7ded1655db4688ea4f71456df0b98c8b9330d0ad897fc4c06c9 / 13517 bytes; verified at landing-time pre-amendment). (A) FU-EB-URO-VIEWER-TOKEN-MINT-LAND-1 is a dangling FK reference in FU-EB-USER-JWT-JTI-CLAIM-1.blocks[] — no FU entry by that id exists in the 307-FU register (eb-agent:query-followups limit=400 verified). Reframed in notes section (3) to substrate-honest form. (B) File-path observation: this spec correctly targets apps/api-gateway/src/main.ts per EB-chat's framework substrate-read (eb-agent:query-tech-components confirmed Express ^4.18 LTS). Adjacent open FU FU-EB-URO-T1-ROUTE-MOUNTING-1 (P2 open) references apps/api-gateway/src/server.ts — substrate may have evolved between T1 closure 2026-06-05 and this arc, or the FU has stale path. EB-CLI substrate-read at execution time will catch any actual file-not-found; the FU's potentially-stale path remains as separate adjacent FU-register hygiene item (out of scope for this arc per memory #18 scope-lock). (C) T5 forward-reference reframed in OUT-3 description: T5 deliverable is at S4-authored / v1.0.0 (SR PR #171 merged 2026-06-09 16:48 PDT); T5 execution merged at EB PR #323 / 6924f97 2026-06-09T18:36:57 PDT; T5 TRUTH-DELIVERED not yet authored on SR main — so 'T5 closed-with-debt cited this gate' was forward-referencing at authoring time. Reframed to anticipated-state framing that holds whether T5 closes clean or with-debt. These three corrections do not alter the scope, output set, or acceptance criteria of this deliverable; they only reconcile substrate claims with the verified state on SR main b4ef429862c20e14d4fcaa20b5320709e5d30a29 and the 307-FU register as of 2026-06-09. Schema validation re-passes post-amendment (Draft 7 + ajv canonical 3-flag set). Substrate-correction lesson per memory #13 SUBSTRATE-CORRECTION: when authoring chat-side, dangling FK references in the FU register's blocks[]/blocked_by[] arrays must be probed against the actual FU id set, not treated as live FUs. Filed for adjacent FU-register hygiene scope at next L4 named-step.
